name: Turkey Corn Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and sauté until transparent.
2. Push the onion to one side of the pot. Add ground turkey and cook, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients (tomatoes, salt, pepper, sugar) except for the canned milk.
4. Pour in boiling water and bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and let simmer for 30 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
6. Before serving, remove from heat and slowly stir in the canned evaporated milk.
